reviews.comment:
No destaca de cualquier otra YPF. Pero es imprescindible cargar acá, ya que es la única estación de la zona. Ya sea para recorrer la península tranquilo, o para emprender el viaje de vuelta.

(Translated by Google)
It's not unlike any other YPF station. But filling up here is essential, as it's the only station in the area. Whether you're exploring the peninsula at your leisure or starting your return trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16378069522629065446/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBN0pIamhRRRAB
